data.name: SuccessMessage
data.value: The action has been successfully completed!

data.name: FailMessage
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while processing your request. Please contact the administrator.

data.name: NotFound
data.value: The requested resource was not found.

data.name: AccessDenied
data.value: You do not have permission to perform this action.

data.name: StringLengthField
data.value: The {0} field must be between {2} and {1} characters.

data.name: MinLengthField
data.value: The {0} field must be at least {1} characters long.

data.name: RangeField
data.value: The {0} field must be between {1} and {2}.

data.name: EmailAddressField
data.value: Please enter a valid email address.

data.name: PhoneField
data.value: Please enter a valid phone number.

data.name: ConcurrencyFailure
data.value: Optimistic concurrency failure, object has been modified.

data.name: LoginAlreadyAssociated
data.value: A user with this external login already exists.

data.name: InvalidUserName
data.value: Username '{0}' is invalid. It can only contain letters or digits.

data.name: DuplicateEmail
data.value: A user with email '{0}' already exists.

data.name: UserAlreadyHasPassword
data.value: The user already has a password set.

data.name: UserLockoutNotEnabled
data.value: Lockout is not enabled for this user.

data.name: UserAlreadyInRole
data.value: The user is already in role '{0}'.

data.name: UserNotInRole
data.value: The user is not in role '{0}'.

data.name: PasswordTooShort
data.value: The password must be at least {0} characters long.

data.name: PasswordRequiresUniqueChars
data.value: The password must contain at least {0} unique characters.

data.name: PasswordRequiresNonAlphanumeric
data.value: The password must contain at least one non-alphanumeric character.

data.name: PasswordRequiresDigit
data.value: The password must contain at least one digit ('0'-'9').

data.name: PasswordRequiresLower
data.value: The password must contain at least one lowercase letter ('a'-'z').

data.name: PasswordRequiresUpper
data.value: The password must contain at least one uppercase letter ('A'-'Z').
